technical_replicate: Cell lysate from each replicate was first divided into three identical aliquots
experimental_design: quantification of SSG, total oxidation, and total thiols in a single LC-MS/MS run

factor_value: oxidative stress induced by exposure to engineered metal oxide nanoparticles
